positive: A vibrant retro vaporwave scene of a futuristic sports car driving down a neon-lit grid highway at sunset. Palm trees silhouette, magenta and cyan color scheme, 1980s synthwave aesthetic, VHS glitch effect, highly stylized, lo-fi illustration.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, natural lighting, realism, messy brushstrokes
